title: Walkers
description: The Walkers mod adds a variety of new features into Minecraft that aim to change the direction of the Mob System and Night stage throughout the game.
body:
![Walkers Mod: Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/988fc3f03be7b44f4744fae5fa5e749f341bf315.png)

‎ 

The Walkers mod adds a variety of new features into Minecraft that aim to **_change the direction of the Mob System and Night stage throughout the game._**

**Features + Images:**

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Infection system**

![Walker Mod: Infection stage: 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20b84b6bb513131562fe85d083702061fb53a053.png)
![Walker Mod: Infection stage: 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/894fa1e90100065e2d632b285090c0bedb0a76a1.png) - 2 stages
  
‎ 

**More 'Zombie' / Walker variants**
![Walkers Mod: Undead Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/808180eb143ef1130cdf386aeabc4c9924ee9be9.png)
- Includes: Rotters, Walkers, Biters, Variant Walkers, Zombie Pigs &
Zombie Cows 
  
‎ 

**Random Walker strengths and speed**
![Strong Walker, Fresh Walker, Weak Walker, Rotted Walker.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/a6132cd7cf432b0fcedbe5b1da660780c0f9f7eb.png)
- Variables include: Fresh Walker, Weak Walker, Strong Walker & Rotted Walker.

‎ 

**Reanimation on death when infected**

![Showcase of reanimation on a 'Survivor'](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/107cad66e7905d9c7b9907aca191d0c127b7bbe9.png)
- All entities, not just the player
  
‎ 

**'Wasted' Biome**
![Walkers Mod title over the wasted biome with walkers around the land.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/592972f142bafbfcab8508daefee55a80f144728.png)
- Full of the undead and littered
with a decaying environment
  
‎ 

**Walkers & Zombies don't burn in daylight**
- If you have zombies enabled. (not by
  default with this mod)
  
‎ 

**Survivors**
- A passive mob that will group up with
others and just generally live, they are
useful in villages and the wild for attacking
the undead
  
‎ 

**Custom Walker Animations**
![Zombie Death Animation Pose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/cfeefb508702aed99367176777e7f1dfc3c167eb.png)
- Includes: new walk animation, new sprint
animation, new attack animation, new die
animation
  
‎ 

**7 Advancements**
![Walkers Mod: Advancements Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/K0br4bKQ/images/4b7d69d0186a8dd14d332b14585f5f818ade47d3.png)
- Yes, in a way this mod can be completed even in Hardcore]
  
‎ 

**Infected skin & infected flesh**
- On eaten will infect the player. Used to craft Walker Flesh Clothing
  
‎ 

**Walker Flesh Clothing**
- Blend in with the horse

‎ 

**Removed Zombies & Zombie Villagers**
- They got replaced by the new undead types

‎ 

</details>

**How it works:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

* Getting infected is a 70% chance on hit from any 'undead' mob that isn't a Skeleton or anything else, ect..

* 30% chance of getting Adrenaline on getting infected

* All infected entities (except cows and pigs) will turn into a random undead walker once the infection has either played out or they have died whilst infected prematurely. Pig & Cows do the same - except with their own undead variants.

* Walkers will attack: Villagers, Survivors, Players,  Pigs, Cows & Horse.

* Zombie Cows & Pigs will also attack Chickens.



</details>





**INFORMATION**
- Using this mod in a mod pack is fine, with credit of course.
- Using this mod in a YouTube playthrough is fine, with credit of course.
- Making a 'Fork' of this mod is okay with me, with credit of course.



⚠️ **_THIS MOD IS CURRENTLY ONLY AVAILABLE FOR FORGE 1.20.1 - IF I GET ANY  REQUESTS I WILL ATTEMPT TO SUPPORT OTHER VERSIONS & LOADERS!_** ⚠️
